name: Zilong

skills.name: Dragon's Roar
skills.description: The lower his Health, the greater his damage reduction and skills.

skills.name: Thunderbreaker
skills.description: Zilong charges forward, dealing damage and enhancing his next Basic Attack. This skill's cooldown is reset whenever his Health reaches a certain level.

skills.name: Stormpiercer
skills.description: Jabs repeatedly in the target direction, dealing damage. Recovers Health on hit.

skills.name: Skysplitter
skills.description: Leaps to the target area, damaging and launching enemies in the center.
